issues.description: Action type is 'PowerBoost' but card grants protection from K.O., not a power boost. Should use a protection/immunity action or custom mechanic.

Duration is 'EndOfTurn' but text specifies 'until the end of your opponent's next turn', which is a longer duration spanning into the opponent's next turn. Should be 'EndOfOpponentTurn' or equivalent multi-turn duration.
Missing Blocker ability entirely. The card's passive Blocker effect is not represented in the DSL. Should include separate trigger for Blocker mechanic.
